name: Snow Punch
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together the banana, lemon juice, and sugar until smooth.
2. Chill thoroughly in the refrigerator.
3. Pour into a punch bowl, stirring in the heavy cream.
4. Slowly pour in the chilled lemon-lime soda.
5. Float 4 or 5 scoops of lemon sherbet on top.
6. (Optional) Add maraschino cherries and flaked coconut on top.
Note: This is an excellent refreshment for entertaining, and children love it! Remember to add more scoops of sherbet when it melts. Enjoy!
